verses.text: If a prophet's sign comes true but he calls to other gods, hear him not. The test. God proves your love.
If a prophet's sign comes true but he calls to other gods, hear him not. The test. God proves your love.
If a prophet's sign comes true but he calls to other gods, hear him not. The test. God proves your love.
Follow the LORD; that false prophet shall die. Cleave. Loyalty to God is supreme.
Follow the LORD; that false prophet shall die. Cleave. Loyalty to God is supreme.
If a loved one entices you to idols, consent not. No exception. Even kin must not lead astray.
If a loved one entices you to idols, consent not. No exception. Even kin must not lead astray.
If a loved one entices you to idols, consent not. No exception. Even kin must not lead astray.
He shall be put to death, that all Israel hear and fear. Purge. Sin is not hidden.
He shall be put to death, that all Israel hear and fear. Purge. Sin is not hidden.
He shall be put to death, that all Israel hear and fear. Purge. Sin is not hidden.
If a city turns to idols, it shall be utterly destroyed. The city. Apostasy is purged.
If a city turns to idols, it shall be utterly destroyed. The city. Apostasy is purged.
If a city turns to idols, it shall be utterly destroyed. The city. Apostasy is purged.
If a city turns to idols, it shall be utterly destroyed. The city. Apostasy is purged.
Its spoil is burnt; keep nothing, that God's anger turn. Devoted. Nothing cursed is kept.
Its spoil is burnt; keep nothing, that God's anger turn. Devoted. Nothing cursed is kept.
